notes: The response is structured as an advisory checklist of open questions and action items rather than a formal discovery artefact — it partially surfaces assumptions and regulatory gaps (D5 strength) but lacks a bounded problem statement, named personas with cost/timing, a scoped MVP with explicit deferrals, an out-of-scope section, and critically misses the SWIFT correspondent bank agreement (C5) as a hard constraint, making it incomplete across nearly all structured dimensions.
